concept.headline: One Day. One Studio. Real Festival Energy.
concept.body: A digital festival day recorded and streamed from the studio. Intimate, in-the-round, built for the camera. Three to five artist performances, a tight run of show, and a release pipeline that lives past the night. The attendee experience goes from interest to empowerment — discover artists and moments in real time, then know exactly how to support and where to find the story after.

rsvp.heading: Stay in the Loop
rsvp.body: Be first to know when lineup drops, tickets open, and the stream goes live.
